name: feelweell
description: Package JSON que ayudará a levantar todos los servicios desde una terminal

scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd ai-chat-service && pnpm install && cd ../auth-service && pnpm install && cd ../client-admin && pnpm install && cd ../healthy-service && pnpm install && cd ../mood-tracking && pnpm install
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n "IA,AUTH,DAILY,HEALTHY,MOOD,CLIENT" -c "cyan,blue,yellow,green,magenta,red" "pnpm run ia" "pnpm run auth" "pnpm run daily" "pnpm run healthy" "pnpm run mood" "pnpm run client"

author: Los Debuggers
